entity.summary: Berachain decentralized exchange implementing multi-pool stableswap liquidity, omni-pools, single- and multi-token deposits, and rehypothecation-oriented yield strategies.
entity.notes: HEI models the current burve.fi stableswap protocol, omni-pools, pool positions, and Berachain deployment as one exchange entity. It is distinct from older unrelated Burve Protocol materials on burve.io focused on bonding-curve launch products.

evidence.title: Burve liquidity quickstart
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Burve's multi-pool stableswap and omni-pool liquidity workflow, including single- and multi-token deposits, swap-fee earning, and position management.

evidence.title: Burve protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol metrics identify the current burve.fi Berachain stableswap DEX and report non-zero current TVL, corroborating continuing operation.
